scenarios.description: Sanity envelope for the first full player loop: prepare, board a derelict, survive pressure, loot, craft, return, and buy an upgrade.

metrics.note: Scenario should pressure oxygen without forcing failure.
Hunger should matter but not starve the player in one short run.
Thirst should be visible but not unrecoverable.
Run must produce enough reward to justify risk.
At least one craft closes the loot-to-usefulness loop.
One successful short run can buy the basic hub storage upgrade but not a high-tier chain.
Task 14 scenario targets the first upgrade tier.

scenarios.description: Combat should create threat pressure, loot should recover value, and crafting should convert salvage into a usable item.
